---
title: "Key Info and Announcements"
date-modified: "today"
format: 
  html:
    link-external-newwindow: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Announcements

- Office hours on instructor page!
  - Mine will be after class on Wednesday's!
- My new schedule shading... annoying or helpful or nothing?
- Reminder: I am teaching a data science course next year (spring)
  - It'll be a pilot course and be under BSTA 504

### Events in SPH
![](../images_key_info/key_info1.png)

![](../images_key_info/key_info2.png)

## Key Dates

- Lab 1 dues 4/12

## Last class

- Discussed the pros and cons of each measurement of **association**
  - risk difference, risk ratio, and odds ratio
- Moved to today: Calculated Cohen's Kappa: measurement of **agreement**
